history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young woman with long, dark hair, her face tilted downwards. Her tongue is sticking out, with the tip touching her red lipstick-covered lips. Her eyes are large and heavily made up with dramatic false eyelashes. In the foreground, her hand holds a blue and silver lighter, with the flame burning brightly and illuminating her face and tongue. The lighting is dramatic and warm, with the bright flame casting strong highlights and shadows. The background is softly blurred and appears to be a light-colored, possibly white or off-white surface, with a small, red and white object visible in the lower right corner. The overall mood is provocative and edgy, with a touch of rebellion. The style is candid and intimate, with a shallow depth of field emphasizing the subject. The color palette is dominated by warm tones from the flame and skin, contrasted with the dark hair and the cool blue of the lighter.
